text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kobe Shimbun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen considers all the training she's
done up to this point and imagines how the race
will develop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares that she'll secure victory, then heads
for the track.
